Research.title: [Promo Code] GO Tour Fairy Type Timed Research
Research.description:
All Trainers can redeem the following code to receive Fairy type Timed Research available starting with Pokémon GO Tour in person events.
Code: TH4NKY0UF41RYMUCH Quick Redeem: https://store.pokemongo.com/offer-redemption?passcode=TH4NKY0UF41RYMUCH
It is not clear when this promo code will expire. The dates shown on this page are for the Timed Research.

Raid Battles.title: Groudon in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Groudon will be in five-star raid battles from April 15, 2026 to April 21, 2026.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Groudon from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- April 15

Raid Battles.description: Shadow Latios will appear in Pokémon GO in Shadow Raids. If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Latios! Shadow Latios will appear in five-star Shadow Raids every weekend from April 1 to May 5.

Raid Battles.description: Mega Banette will be in Mega Raids from April 29, 2026 at 6 am to May 5, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Raid Battles.title: Buzzwole, Pheromosa, and Xurkitree in 5-star Raid Battles
Raid Battles.description:
Buzzwole, Pheromosa, and Xurkitree will be in five-star raid battles from May 13, 2026 to May 20, 2026.
- Buzzwole will appear in the Americas and Greenland.
- Pheromosa will appear in Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and India.
- Xurkitree will appear in the Asia-Pacific region.
There will also be a Raid Hour featuring these Pokemon from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- May 13
These Pokemon will remain in their respective regions.

Max Battles.title: Replay: GO Bigger

bonuses: 1/4 Adventuring distance to receive Max Particles*
2× Max Particles from exploring*
2× XP from Max Battles
8× Max Particles from Power Spots
Additional Power Spots will be active
All Power Spots will host Gigantamax Battles
From April 24 at 5:00 p.m. to April 25 at 8:00 p.m. PDT (GMT −7), the daily Remote Raid limit will increase from 10 to 20
Max Particle collection limit increased to 1,600
Power Spots will refresh more frequently
Up to three Special Trades for the day

Max Battles.description: Giants of the Kanto region return to Max Battles during Replay: GO Bigger!

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Shuckle during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokémon may appear in Max Battles throughout Memories in Motion. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.
- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.
- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.
- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokémon.
On April 27, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokémon is Shuckle.
- Shuckle

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Memories in Motion
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from April 21, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to April 28, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Fantasy Cup: Great League Edition | Memories in Motion
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Fantasy Cup: Great League Edition will run from April 28, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to May 5, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Dragon-, Steel-, and Fairy-type Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and Jungle Cup: Great League Edition | Memories in Motion
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and Jungle Cup: Great League Edition will run from May 5, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to May 12, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Normal-, Grass-, Electric-, Poison-, Ground-, Flying-, Bug-, and Dark-type Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Master League and Catch Cup: Memories in Motion: Great League Edition | Memories in Motion
GO Battle League.description:
The Master League and Catch Cup: Memories in Motion: Great League Edition will run from May 12, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to May 19, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- All Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Pokémon caught during the Memories in Motion Season are eligible.
- Pokémon must be caught between March 3, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. and June 2, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. local time.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Memories in Motion
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from May 19, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to May 26, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Memories in Motion
GO Battle League.description:

Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.

Raid Day.title: Shadow Entei Raid Day

bonuses: 2x Stardust from Raid Battles
50% more XP from Raid Battles
Eight additional Raid Passes from spinning Gym Photo Discs (for a daily total of 14)
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Entei from Shadow Raids
Increased chance to get Rare Candy XL from Raid Battles
The Remote Raid limit will increase to 20 from Friday, May 1, at 5:00 p.m. to Saturday, May 2, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. PDT
Up to five additional free Raid Passes from spinning Gym Photo Discs (for a total of six)

Raid Day.description: Battle in the shadow of the Volcano Pokemon on Entei Shadow Raid Day!

Raid Day.title: Raid Day
Raid Day.description: The Raid Day event will take place on May 23, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Event.title: Steeled Resolve

bonuses: 2× Catch Candy
Earn more Stardust from defeating Team GO Rocket Grunts
Reduced wait time before opening the Mystery Box again during the event

Event.description:
Steel yourselves for the return of Steeled Resolve with Meltan, Orthworm, and more!
The Steeled Resolve event will take place from April 28, 2026 at 10 am to May 4, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Steeled Resolve: Taken Over

bonuses: For the first time in Pokémon GO, you'll be able to hatch Shiny Varoom from 12 km Eggs.
Pokémon caught via one-star and three-star Shadow Raids during the event will have a wider variance of Attack, Defense, and HP
Team GO Rocket will appear more frequently at PokéStops and in balloons*
You can use a Charged TM to help a Shadow Pokémon forget the Charged Attack Frustration

Event.description: Rescue Shadow Incarnate Forme Landorus and more during Steeled Resolve: Taken Over!

Event.title: Spring Marathon 2026

bonuses: 1/2 Egg Hatch Distance when Eggs are placed in an Incubator during the event period
2× XP for spinning a PokéStop
GO Pass Deluxe: 3× XP for spinning a PokéStop

Event.description:
Lace up your walking shoes and prepare for a Spring Marathon in Pokémon GO!
The Spring Marathon 2026 event will take place from May 12, 2026 at 10 am to May 18, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Example Event Template (Auto ToC Demo)
Event.description:
This file demonstrates the reusable event pattern:
- Keep all section if blocks in the template body.
- Set event_toc_auto: true.
- Fill data lists only for sections you want to show.
- Leave unused section data empty to auto-hide both section and ToC item.

GO Pass.title: GO Pass: April

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Hold 10 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Hold up to 20 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Increased Stardust and XP from hatching Eggs
Open up to 40 Gifts per day
Open up to 50 Gifts per day
Receive up to 125 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs
Receive up to 150 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs

GO Pass.description:
Rank up to earn rewards including an encounter with Entei, a Lucky Trinket (GO Pass Deluxe), and more!
From Tuesday, April 7, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, May 5, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for April will be available in Pokémon GO!

Community Day.title: Lechonk Community Day

bonuses: 1-hour Lures*
1/4 Egg Hatch Distance
2x Catch Candy
2x Chance to receive Candy XL from catching Pokemon
3-hour Incense
Increased Spawns
One additional Special Trade can be made for a maximum of two for the day*
Trades made will require 50% less Stardust*

Community Day.description: Lechonk, the Hog Pokémon, will be featured during May Community Day!

Community Day.title: May Community Day Classic
Community Day.description: The May Community Day Classic event will take place on May 16, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Pokémon GO Fest.title: Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Tokyo

bonuses: 1.5× Hatch Candy
1.5× Hatch Stardust
1/2 Egg Hatch Distance
1/2 Stardust cost for all trades
2-hour Incense duration (excluding Daily Adventure Incense)
2-hour Lure Module duration
2× Catch Candy
Hourly event-themed Field Research
Increased chance of catching Pokémon with a Premier Ball
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon for ticket holders
Increased time for Party Play sessions
Open up to 50 Gifts each ticketed citywide gameplay day
Special event-themed Eggs
Special event-themed stickers available from PokéStops and Gifts
Trainer Challenges: four Timed Research challenges across Tokyo that count toward the Pokémon GO Expert medal
Up to 6 Special Trades per day
Up to 9 daily Raid Passes by spinning Photo Discs at Gyms

Pokémon GO Fest.description:
Location: Tokyo Waterfront City, Tokyo, Japan Dates: May 29–June 1, 2026 Time: 10:00 a.m. – 8:00 p.m. JST (Park and citywide event hours vary by ticket)
Trainers can look forward to exceptional coaching by Team Mystic’s leader, Blanche, during an exciting park session in Tokyo Waterfront City that will help them become their very best. Ticket-holding Trainers will also set off on a citywide adventure across four distinct City Districts in Tokyo, developing their skills and earning a unique in-game Pokémon GO Expert medal.
All event gameplay is exclusive to ticket holders. You will only be able to experience the park experience within Tokyo Waterfront City during the date and time noted on your event ticket. Citywide gameplay requires either a Base event ticket with citywide gameplay, a Citywide Gameplay add-on, or a City Explorer ticket.

Pokémon GO Fest.title: Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global
Pokémon GO Fest.description: The Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global event will take place from July 11, 2026 at 10 am to July 12, 2026 at 6 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Season.title: Memories in Motion

bonuses: Increased XP and Stardust for a seven-day Pokémon catch streak
Increased XP for a seven-day PokéStop spin streak
One additional Candy when trading Pokémon in-person
One guaranteed Candy XL when trading Pokémon in-person (Trainers level 31+)

Season.description:
Welcome to Pokémon GO: Memories in Motion!
In Pokémon GO, Seasons are periods of time that feature new events, Pokémon debuts, and surprises that all follow a certain theme. As the Seasons change, you may find different Pokémon appearing in your area and hatching from Eggs. Make sure to explore during each in-game Season to collect and train as many different Pokémon as you can! You’ll also enjoy special bonuses as you do.
